network_summary: Dr. Nathan Hoffman DDS and co-founder Dr. Adam Unterbrunner DDS operate The Chicago Dental Studio, a dentist-owned private multi-location GP dental group with 7 locations across Chicago. Four of those locations fall within watched-IL ZIPs. NPPES legal entities (HOFFMAN AND UNTERBRUNNER, LLC; HOFFMAN & UNTERBRUNNER OF MAYFAIR; HOFFMAN OF LAKEVIEW P.C.; H & U OF WEST LOOP LLC) reflect the co-founder partnership structure. The consumer brand 'The Chicago Dental Studio' is used across all locations. No MSO, management company, or PE backing was found.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Nathan Hoffman DDS (founder/owner) and Dr. Adam Unterbrunner DDS (co-founder), both graduates of University of Iowa College of Dentistry; co-founded The Chicago Dental Studio in 2012.
legal_entities: H & U OF WEST LOOP LLC
durable_artifacts: Shared authorized official NATHAN HOFFMAN across 4 watched-IL NPI org records (NPIs: 1356747927, 1285900654, 1467227645, 1962949610)
Official website thechicagodentalstudio.com lists all 4 watched addresses as branded locations of The Chicago Dental Studio
NPPES legal entity name pattern 'HOFFMAN & UNTERBRUNNER' shared across Mayfair and River North/West Loop filings
LinkedIn profile confirms Nathan Hoffman as Dentist/Owner of The Chicago Dental Studio
drunterbrunner.com bio confirms Adam Unterbrunner as co-founder, 2012
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: HOFFMAN OF LAKEVIEW P.C. (location_id a762147ff96d4c1a, NPI 1467227645) has year_established=2024 and provider_count=0 — this may be a recently registered entity shell not yet staffed; the official CDS website does list a Lakeview location at 3211 N Clark St 60657, so it appears active under the brand even if NPI provider count is 0. H & U OF WEST LOOP LLC (c7e3a014ba70dd36) also has provider_count=0 but the CDS West Loop at 207 S Halsted is confirmed active on Yelp (131 reviews). No stale or closed indicators found for Mayfair or River North.
evidence_chain: AO signal: NATHAN HOFFMAN is the authorized official on 4 org-NPI records across 4 Chicago ZIPs. Documentary corroboration: (1) thechicagodentalstudio.com/about-us/ lists Dr. Nathan Hoffman as founder/owner and shows all 4 watched addresses as CDS locations; (2) thechicagodentalstudio.com/about-us/nathan-hoffman/ confirms his DDS credential, ownership role, and practice at River North (443 W Huron) and Lincoln Park; (3) drunterbrunner.com/about-dr-unterbrunner/ confirms Dr. Adam Unterbrunner as co-founder since 2012, explaining the NPPES H&U entity names; (4) LinkedIn profile confirms 'Dentist/Owner' title at The Chicago Dental Studio; (5) Yelp listings for both 443 W Huron and 207 S Halsted confirm active practice under the CDS brand. No MSO, management company, PE investor, or DSO platform found.
future_app_notes: CDS has 7 total locations; only 4 are in watched-IL ZIPs. The remaining 3 (Lincoln Park 60614, Wicker Park 60622, South Loop 60605) are also watched ZIPs but do not appear in this AO cluster — check whether those location_ids exist in practice_locations with a different AO or entity. If CDS grows further, the brand could eventually cross the threshold for branded_dso consideration, but as of 2026 it is a dentist-owned private group with no management-company layer found. Watch for any future PE transaction given the 7-location footprint.
